subject: fix(cors): add see-veo.vercel.app to allowed origins and set preflight headers
body:
The /api/health endpoint was blocking cross-origin requests from
see-veo.vercel.app because the origin wasn't in the CORS allowlist.
Also added Access-Control-Allow-Methods and Access-Control-Allow-Headers
to OPTIONS preflight responses — these were missing from all endpoints.

Tags: cors, api, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cors
Semver: patch

title: add see-veo.vercel.app to allowed origins and set preflight headers
